title: Sophisticated Backpacks easier upgrade
description: You can upgrade Diamond backpack to Netherite backpack on crafting table
body:
![alt text](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1401/37/ls3_low_pix-png.png)
# Sophisticated Backpacks Easier Upgrade You can upgrade Diamond backpack to Netherite backpack on crafting table require：sophisticatedbackpacks # 精妙背包简易升级 你可以在工作台中将钻石背包升级为下界合金背包 前置模组：精妙背包（sophisticatedbackpacks）![alt text](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1401/35/aa1aeaa34-2025-11-22-165042-jpg.jpg) ![alt text](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1401/36/aa1aeaa34-2025-11-22-165127-jpg.jpg)
